# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-03-03 | **更新时间**: 06:51 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[22:10]` **🏛️监管 | XellSmart 连续第四次获得美国 FDA 和中国 NMPA 的 MSA-P iPSC 衍生细胞疗法 IND 许可**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *XellSmart Receives Fourth Consecutive US FDA & China NMPA IND Clearance for MSA-P iPSC-derived Cell Therapy* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:30]` **Orca Bio 将在 52 周年大会上展示其高精度细胞疗法产品线的临床数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Orca Bio to Present Clinical Data on Its Pipeline of High-Precision Cell Therapies at the 52* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:01]` **Precision BioSciences 从 TG Therapeutics 获得 750 万美元收益，实现 Azer-cel 多发性硬化症临床里程碑**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Precision BioSciences Receives $7.5M in Proceeds from TG Therapeutics for Azer-cel Clinical Milestone in Multiple Sclerosis* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
